funding_opportunities.program_name: iTIC IIT Hyderabad Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: iTIC Incubator, IIT Hyderabad
benefits: Advanced incubation (12 months) for product-ready startups
Access to Maker Lab and IITH infrastructure

eligibility.summary: Idea-stage, prototype-stage, and early-traction deep tech entrepreneurs. Open to Indian citizens. Multiple stage-wise programs available from pre-incubation to acceleration.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: NICE Fellowship & Incubation at IIT Hyderabad (NMDC-iTIC)
funding_opportunities.organization: NMDC Innovation and Incubation Centre (NICE) at iTIC IIT Hyderabad
benefits: NICE Fellowship: up to INR 9.6 lakhs sustenance and prototyping funding for 12 months
NICE Incubation: up to INR 25 lakhs financial aid (in exchange of up to 3% equity)
Access to IITH infrastructure and Makerlab

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens, graduates in engineering or science. For NICE Fellowship: idea/PoC stage. For NICE Incubation: prototype/MVP stage with deep tech focus and possible IP. Private Limited company adhering to DPIIT startup definition for incubation track.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: TiHAN Incubation & PRAYAS/EIR Program at IIT Hyderabad
funding_opportunities.organization: TiHAN Foundation, IIT Hyderabad (DST NM-ICPS)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India
benefits: TiHAN Incubation: up to INR 25 lakhs funding for prototype stage
TiHAN PRAYAS/EiR: up to INR 10 lakhs financial aid for idea stage
Access to IITH labs and TiHAN testbeds

eligibility.summary: For Incubation: startups with definite PoC at prototype stage working on autonomous navigation and data acquisition systems. For PRAYAS/EiR: idea-stage entrepreneurs and aspiring entrepreneurs in autonomous systems domain. Indian citizens.

incubation_support: Access to IITH labs and testbeds
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY TIDE 2.0 at iTIC IIT Hyderabad
funding_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) through iTIC IIT Hyderabad
benefits: EiR stipend up to INR 4 lakhs for 1 year for idea/PoC stage
Grant support up to INR 7 lakhs for prototype stage

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens. For EiR: idea/PoC stage with at least one co-founder willing to pursue full-time. For Grant: PoC or prototype stage. ICT-enabled startups in emerging tech areas of societal relevance.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: TIDES IIT Roorkee Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Technology Innovation and Development of Entrepreneurship Society (TIDES), IIT Roorkee
benefits: Access to IIT Roorkee labs and research facilities

eligibility.summary: Technology startups and individual innovators. Company registration required within 3 months of approval. Open to technology-driven ventures across sectors.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY TIDE 2.0 - EIR Fellowship at TIDES IIT Roorkee
funding_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) through TIDES IIT Roorkee
benefits: EiR fellowship of INR 4 lakhs for 1 year

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens, completed undergraduate degree in science/engineering or last-year student not seeking placement. Under 35 years. Not a promoter/shareholder of another company. Should be committed to exploring a business idea. Preference for MedTech and biotech sectors.

incubation_support: Access to TIDES facilities and Bio-incubator
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Guwahati Technology Incubation Centre (IITG-TIC) Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: IIT Guwahati Technology Incubation Centre (IITG-TIC)
benefits: Seed funding up to INR 50 lakhs through partner programs
Co-working space at Technology Complex, IIT Guwahati
Access to IITG prototyping labs and research infrastructure

eligibility.summary: Alumni of IIT Guwahati, faculty members, PhD/MTech/BTech final year students of IITG, alumni from central/state govt engineering institutions in North East India, engineering/science graduates, individuals partnering with IITG faculty/alumni. Private Limited company required.

incubation_support: Co-working space at IITG Technology Complex
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Jodhpur TISC Pre-Incubation & Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Technology Innovation and Start-up Center (TISC), IIT Jodhpur
benefits: Physical incubation (2-3 years, extendable to 5 for Deep Tech)
Virtual incubation (2-3 years) for remote startups
Access to IIT Jodhpur prototyping labs and CoEs

eligibility.summary: Pre-incubation: individual innovators with early-stage ideas. Physical/virtual incubation: registered DPIIT-recognized startups ready to build and scale. Open to researchers, faculty, and entrepreneurs across sectors.

incubation_support: Centers of Excellence in AI, Biotech, Renewable Energy
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: iHub Drishti Foundation Startup Seed Support Program at IIT Jodhpur
funding_opportunities.organization: iHub Drishti Foundation, IIT Jodhpur
benefits: Seed funding up to INR 50 lakhs on equity basis
Technical support from IIT Jodhpur faculty
Incubation support from TISC IIT Jodhpur

eligibility.summary: Company incorporated as Private Limited, DPIIT-recognized startup. Preference for technology business products, social impact, startups with paid customers, or existing angel investors. Rolling call evaluated monthly.

incubation_support: Incubation support from TISC IIT Jodhpur
mentorship_support: Technical support from IIT Jodhpur faculty
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: iHub Drishti Foundation EIR Program at IIT Jodhpur
funding_opportunities.organization: iHub Drishti Foundation, IIT Jodhpur
benefits: Monthly grant support of up to INR 30,000 for 6-12 months
Technical support from IIT Jodhpur faculty
Incubation support from TISC IIT Jodhpur

eligibility.summary: Indian citizen. Completed minimum 4 years of full-time UG/PG in sciences/engineering, or 3-year degree/diploma with 2 years work experience. Must have a technology business idea. Rolling applications evaluated monthly.

incubation_support: Incubation support from TISC IIT Jodhpur
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: BITS Pilani Mookerji Innovation Fund (MIF)
funding_opportunities.organization: PIEDS, BITS Pilani
benefits: Equity funding from INR 5 lakhs to INR 50 lakhs
Global mentor access from Silicon Road Ventures
Coaching and mentorship from PIEDS and partner organisations

eligibility.summary: At least one BITSian co-founder (current student at Pilani/Goa/Hyderabad/Dubai campus or alumni within 5 years). MVP/pre-revenue stage. Preference for revenue-generating startups, DeepTech, women-led, student-led, and high-risk moonshot ideas.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: PIEDS BITS Pilani Samvardhan 2026 Design Accelerator
funding_opportunities.organization: PIEDS, BITS Pilani
funding_opportunities.program_owner: BITS Pilani & BIRAC & Aditya Birla Capital Foundation
benefits: Grant funding up to INR 10 lakhs
Business mentorship and investor readiness training

eligibility.summary: Healthcare-focused hardware startups with working prototype or proof of concept (not idea-stage). Founding team committed to commercialization and market launch. Solutions addressing real healthcare challenges, especially affordability and usability.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: CEDI NIT Trichy Incubation Program (TIDE)
funding_opportunities.organization: Centre for Entrepreneurship Development and Incubation (CEDI), NIT Trichy
benefits: Seed funds up to INR 25 lakhs for technology-oriented ideas
Access to NITT infrastructure and departmental labs

eligibility.summary: Technology-oriented innovative business ideas in ICT and electronics domain. Student startups and graduate startups welcome. Must be willing to incubate at CEDI NIT Trichy. Sonata Software partnership for additional funding support.

incubation_support: Co-working space at NIT Trichy Central Library
Access to NITT departmental labs and infrastructure
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: NITK STEP Incubation Program (Surathkal)
funding_opportunities.organization: NITK Science and Technology Entrepreneurs Park (STEP)

eligibility.summary: Open to all eligible applicants including student startups, idea-stage ventures. No NITK affiliation required. Private Limited company required post-selection. Rolling applications throughout the year.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Madras Incubation Cell (IITMIC) / RTBI Incubation
funding_opportunities.organization: IIT Madras Incubation Cell (IITMIC) / RTBI
benefits: Incubation at IITM Research Park (35,000+ sq ft)
Seed grants, equity, loans and convertible debt
Access to IIT Madras research ecosystem
Mentorship from alumni and faculty network

eligibility.summary: Technology and knowledge-based ventures. Open to students, faculty, staff, alumni of IITM and external entrepreneurs. Strong preference for deep tech and social impact startups. Applications accepted year-round via email with business plan.

incubation_support: Co-working space at IITM Research Park
mentorship_support: IIT Madras faculty and alumni mentorship
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: SINE IIT Bombay Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Society for Innovation and Entrepreneurship (SINE), IIT Bombay
benefits: Equity-free incubation support for select startups
Access to IIT Bombay research ecosystem
Mentorship from faculty and industry experts
Project Titanium for IITB IP-based pre-incubation

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups. SINE supports external startups as well as IIT Bombay-affiliated ventures. Various programs including incubation, Project Titanium (IP-based), and TIDE 2.0. Sector agnostic with focus on deep tech.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Bombay Project Titanium - Deep Tech Pre-Incubation
funding_opportunities.organization: Society for Innovation and Entrepreneurship (SINE), IIT Bombay
benefits: Grant of INR 50 lakhs early-stage capital
Focus on Technology and Market Readiness Levels

eligibility.summary: IP-based teams led by IIT Bombay faculty and researchers. Sector agnostic but must originate from IIT Bombay IP. Aimed at transitioning prototypes to early revenue through entrepreneurship.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IITB-Groww INV.ENT Program (CSR Initiative)
funding_opportunities.organization: Desai Sethi School of Entrepreneurship (DSSE), IIT Bombay
benefits: Track A (PoC Support): INR 30,000 fixed grant, 6-month program, ~100 teams/year
Track B (Grand Challenge): Up to INR 25 lakhs milestone-based funding, 12-20 months, 5 teams/year
Faculty mentor and alumni advisors for Track B
Access to 15,000 sq ft dedicated innovation space

eligibility.summary: Track A: IIT Bombay UG students only. Track B: UG/PG students and researchers of IIT Bombay. Year 1 Grand Challenge theme: AI Empowered Innovations. Applications open year-round via Accubate portal.

incubation_support: 15,000 sq ft innovation space at IIT Bombay
mentorship_support: Track B: Mandatory Faculty Mentor + up to 2 Alumni Advisors
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: ABIF IIT Kharagpur Incubation Program (NABARD)
funding_opportunities.organization: Agri Business Incubation Foundation (ABIF), IIT Kharagpur
benefits: Lab access at IIT Kharagpur AgFE department

eligibility.summary: Startups in agriculture and allied sectors. Incorporation date not older than 10 years. Minimum 51% Indian ownership. Individuals, proprietary concerns, FPOs, OFPOs, partnerships, LLPs eligible. Open round the year.

incubation_support: Incubation at IIT Kharagpur AgFE department
funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY SAMRIDH Accelerator at ABIF IIT Kharagpur
funding_opportunities.organization: Agri Business Incubation Foundation (ABIF), IIT Kharagpur
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) through MSH
benefits: Matching funding support up to INR 40 lakhs

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered startups, technology/software product-based, early-growth stage with proof of concept. Incubation period of minimum 3 months. Must be registered under Companies Act 2013 with 51% Indian shareholding.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: DST NIDHI Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EIR) Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India
funding_opportunities.program_owner: National Science & Technology Entrepreneurship Development Board (NSTEDB), DST
benefits: Monthly fellowship of INR 10,000 to INR 30,000 for up to 12 months
Access to infrastructure at participating TBI

eligibility.summary: Graduate students and early-stage entrepreneurs with technology business ideas. Implemented through 42+ TBIs (Program Execution Partners) across India. Applicants apply through partner TBIs. Sector agnostic.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: i-Hub Gujarat Startup Grow Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: i-Hub Gujarat (Gujarat Student Startup and Innovation Hub)

eligibility.summary: Startups from across sectors. Stage-wise incubation through Mind to Market, Startup Engage, and Startup Grow programs. Open to early-stage innovators and startups.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Karnataka Virtual Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Startup Karnataka / KITS
benefits: Dedicated support for tier-2/3 city entrepreneurs

eligibility.summary: Aspiring entrepreneurs looking to validate ideas, early-stage startups, innovators in impact-driven domains, and teams operating remotely or from tier-2/3 cities.

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Srijan Launchpad - Gujarat ICT & DeepTech Accelerator
funding_opportunities.organization: SACC - Startup Accelerator Chamber of Commerce & i-Hub Gujarat
benefits: Structured acceleration for Deep Tech startups

eligibility.summary: Early-stage technology startups in ICT and Deep Tech domains. Gujarat-based startups preferred. Founders building high-impact technology ventures ready for structured acceleration.
